name: Debt travels across vehicles
summary: 7 dated steps from Twitter LBO through X/xAI to SpaceX bridge and refi. Leverage migrates via common-control combinations, not clean paydown at each step.

name: Infrastructure before supply step
summary: Bond/refi filings (bridge repayment) landed before the first major lock-up unlock (Aug 2026). Company clears bank overhang before tradable float expands — reduces forced-sale risk, does not reduce insider share count.

name: Payday is the sale (TSLA)
summary: Parsed Form 4 open-market sales total ~$40.0B across 5 years. Primary personal liquidity channel while SPCX economic stake remains lock-up gated.

name: Supply staircase H1 2026-27
summary: 4 catalysts in next 120 days: 2026-08-20 First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; ro; 2026-08-20 First major lock-up unlock (~7% pool; ro; 2026-09-02 Goldman bridge $175.50 trigger window en; 2026-09-02 Goldman bridge $175.50 trigger window en. Pattern to watch: each step tests whether retail absorbs insider-adjacent supply.

name: Debt print ≠ equity exit
summary: Recent bond pricing 8-K adds ~$25B notes and retires bridge — classified as cap-structure infrastructure. Musk personal exit channel (Form 4 / unlock) not activated by this filing.

name: Repeatable empire loop
summary: Same structural moves recur: SolarCity into Tesla (2016), Twitter debt into SpaceX IPO (2026). Hype -> vehicle -> control wedge -> belief premium -> exit -> roll. Testing whether SPCX follows the same supply calendar as prior vehicles.
